bio.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Jaymin Maheta, a Senior UI Developer with 6+ years of experience turning complex product requirements into interfaces that feel effortless to use.

My work sits at the intersection of engineering and design — I've led design systems from Figma file to production component library, mentored teams of 200+ across delivery cycles, and shipped 10+ products across healthcare, productivity, and fintech.
I care most about the details most users never consciously notice: load-bearing accessibility, motion that respects intent, and code that's as maintainable as the interface is polished.

experience.description: Leading design system implementation and UI architecture decisions across multiple product lines, mentoring junior developers on component-driven development and accessibility standards.
Owned front-end delivery for core product surfaces, translating Figma designs into production Angular components with a focus on performance and cross-browser consistency.
Built and maintained a shared React component library adopted across three product teams, reducing duplicate UI work and standardizing design tokens.
Started my UI development career building responsive marketing and product pages, developing a strong foundation in semantic HTML, CSS architecture, and JavaScript fundamentals.

awards.title: Spotlight Award
awards.description: Recognized for leading a design system rollout that reduced UI development time across teams.

awards.title: HDFC Gift Voucher
awards.description: Awarded for outstanding contribution to a critical product launch.

awards.title: Team Excellence Award
awards.description: Recognized for mentoring and leading UI delivery across a large cross-functional team.
